---
title: "Talks & Media"
description: "Conference presentations, and media mentions."
date-modified: ""
---

---
title: "Talks & Media"
---

## Selected Presentations

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Shielding Against the Unsafe: Evaluation of Shielded Deep Reinforcement Learning Training Approaches for Autonomous Spacecraft{#shielded-drl-GNC-2026}
*AAS Rocky Mountain Guidance, Navigation, and Control Conference — 2026*

:::
::: {.column width="40%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QIm5NNN0Keo>}}
:::

---

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Performance Evaluation of Shielded Neural Networks for Autonomous Agile Earth Observing Satellites{#shielded-drl-IWPSS-2025}
*International Workshop on Planning & Scheduling for Space — 2025*

:::
::: {.column width="40%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WSGFGcRxNQc >}}  
:::
---

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Improving Robustness of Autonomous Spacecraft Scheduling Using Curriculum Learning{#curriculum-GNC-2025}
*AAS Rocky Mountain Guidance, Navigation, and Control Conference — 2025*

:::
::: {.column width="40%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w29MCgfeeBI >}}  
:::
---

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Reinforcement Learning for Satellite Autonomy Under Different Cloud Coverage Probability Observations{#clouds-ASC-2025}
*AAS Astrodynamics Specialist Conference — 2024*

:::
::: {.column width="40%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9-F0lbItkOM >}}  
:::
---

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Intent Sharing for Emergent Collaboration in Autonomous Earth Observing Constellations{#intent-GNC-2024}
*AAS Rocky Mountain Guidance, Navigation, and Control Conference — 2024*

:::
::: {.column width="40%"}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HeSAXba-K2M >}}  
:::
::::

For a complete list of conference publications, see the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

## Media Mentions

- Second Place — Capture the Satellite Challenge, AIAA SciTech Forum (2026).  
  [CU Boulder article](https://www.colorado.edu/aerospace/cu-boulder-team-earns-second-capture-satellite-challenge) ·
  [Aerospace America](https://aerospaceamerica.aiaa.org/institute/gotcha-students-capture-malfunctioning-satellite-in-spacecraft-control-exercise/)

- Interview about my master's research on flexible multibody satellite dynamics (2022).  
  [CAPES article](https://www.gov.br/capes/pt-br/assuntos/noticias/bolsista-testa-satelite-financiado-pela-nasa)

- Future Skills Camp — International Space Systems Engineering Competition (2020).  
  [UFSM coverage](https://www.ufsm.br/2020/09/10/representantes-da-ufsm-destacam-se-em-competicao-internacional-de-engenharia-de-sistemas-espaciais) ·
  [INPE coverage](https://www.gov.br/inpe/pt-br/assuntos/ultimas-noticias/na-russia-brasileiros-orientados-pelo-inpe-vencem-competicao-internacional-de-engenharia-de-sistemas-espaciais-para-pequenos-satelites-apoiada-pelos-brics)

- First Place, CanSat Category — 2nd CubeDesign Latin American Competition (2019).  
  [Competition coverage](https://www.ufsm.br/unidades-universitarias/ct/2019/08/23/equipe-da-ufsm-vence-competicao-de-nanossatelites)

- Summer Course — Space Engineering Program (2018).  
  [UFSM article](https://www.ufsm.br/midias/arco/o-espaco-e-o-limite)

- First Place — Aerospace Engineering Undergraduate Admission Exam (2015).  
  [School announcement](https://www.fw.uri.br/pt/noticias/escola-basica-e-destaque-em-vestibulares-federais-1200)

- 4th Place — Rio Grande do Sul State Chemistry Olympiad (2014).  
  [School announcement](https://www.fw.uri.br/pt/noticias/alunos-da-escola-basica-obtem-excelente-resultado-na-olimpiada-de-quimica-do-rs-1008) ·
  [Selection for Brazilian Chemistry Olympiad](https://www.fw.uri.br/pt/noticias/alunos-da-escola-basica-sao-selecionados-para-olimpiada-brasileira-de-quimica-347)
